details.name: Praxis Dr. Martin Schmidt
details.extra_info: Labor im Haus. Impfungen möglich. Keine Hausbesuche.

images.prompt: Cartoon-style German doctor's office poster: 'Praxis Dr. Schmidt - Allgemeinmedizin'. Shows stethoscope icon, Friedrichstraße 88, Mo-Fr 8-12 + 14-18, all insurances, lab, vaccinations. Fuxie cartoon, blue/white medical colors, legible font.

Cartoon-style German dentist poster: 'Zahnarztpraxis Dr. Weber'. Shows tooth icon, Schönhauser Allee 45, various hours, children's dentist, parking available. Fuxie cartoon, light blue/mint colors, legible font.
